utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Chandler , I found the perfect ring .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , that is uh , that is pretty nice but I am gonna go with the one I picked first .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh my God Chandler , the one you picked is gone . It is over !

emotion_cause.span: 3_the one you picked is gone . It is over !
3_the one you picked is gone . It is over !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Some guy bought it . I am sorry . I tired to stop it but they put me in jail !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Some guy bought it . I am sorry . I tired to stop it but they put me in jail !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: The little jail between the doors !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Phoebe , I asked you to guard the ring !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Some guy bought it . I am sorry . I tired to stop it but they put me in jail !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know , I am sorry ! But you know , this ring is better ! Monica never even saw the other ring .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I asked you to guard the ring !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah but when he proposed to me with the ring I got goose bumps .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Some guy bought it . I am sorry . I tired to stop it but they put me in jail !
